final_text:
Both documents confirm the conflict with no narrative reconciliation:
- Operations review (higher authority, rank 2): "New enterprise accounts | 49" for Q1 2026, marked "All metrics are final as of 31 March 2026."
- Customer appendix (rank 3): "New enterprise accounts" B7 = 46 for Q1 2026.

Two same-entity, same-period values (49 vs 46) with no explicit supersession, restatement, or scope distinction in either document. The claim matches the lower-authority source and conflicts with the higher-authority one — but authority rank alone cannot resolve this per the rules.
